sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13166" key="a)pomakte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπομακ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n13166.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must wipe,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὰ μέλη</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg009:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
